title: Waterproof your home with WeatherPrufe
description: BUSINESS NEWS - The rainy season is upon us...
bodyText:
Sponsored Content

BUSINESS NEWS - The rainy season is upon us and now is the best time to get your coastal home waterproof by using WeatherPrufe products.


> WeatherPrufe Paints is a fully South Africa, privately-owned paint and waterproofing paint manufacturer with a specialty paint and waterproofing store in George: Shop 21 in the Precap Centre on Courtenay Street at the Mini Pick n Pay.


WeatherPrufe Paints produces a comprehensive range of products, formulated to provide solutions to commonly encountered coating problems.

The staff at WeatherPrufe pride themselves in the technical integrity of their products and are committed to the maintenance of the standard set by these products.

Quality products, strong technical service, honest and accurate advice, along with an eagerness to exceed customers’ expectations, have been the formula for their success enjoyed to date.

On surfaces where many of the traditional waterproofing systems have failed, WeatherPrufe Paints, with its Elastocryl pure acrylic systems with full membrane, have become the top system for the long-term waterproofing of concrete roofs, parapet walls and the areas around windows, as well as underground waterproofing.

Elastocryl is applied by hand and provides an optimal protective layer that is sun and water resistant and will provide many years of excellent protection.

Several of the best building and painting contractors in the area have been using WeatherPrufe products for years with great success.

Elastocryl has been proven in the industry as an excellent alternative for "torch on" waterproofing and can even be used in fish ponds.

WeatherPrufe paints are manufactured specifically for coastal conditions and provide the very best protection against the elements and moisture. They provide coastal homeowners with the best waterproofing acrylic product around, offering high quality, hassle-free paint, with a factory guarantee of up to 10 years.

WeatherPrufe Paints produces a comprehensive range of products, formulated to provide solutions to commonly encountered coating problems.

Its paints are the best and offer the best value for money.

It prides itself in the technical integrity of its products.

WeatherPrufe has been setting the example and has been leading the way, supplying paint for large housing complexes in Mossel Bay and surrounding areas for many years.

Call David Wandrag (082 977 7802) at WeatherPrufe Southern Cape and Garden Route for a free quotation today.

- Website

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
